name: model-typographic-mismatch
source: synthetic (models routinely emit straight quotes where documents carry curly ones)
note: Typographic honesty: finds quoting straight apostrophes/quotes do NOT match curly-quoted document text — both report honest not-found while the clean edit applies. A typographic normalization leniency is considered and DEFERRED (decisions D10): it needs daytime design (quote pairing, dash variants, NBSP) — silently matching across typography risks wrong-target hits.
docMarkdown:
The team’s plan was “ship small, ship often” — and it worked.

A second paragraph closes the note.
